description: Comprehensive testing guidelines for Antigravity including the 4 Pillars of Good Tests framework and the TDD workflow. Covers test quality principles (Reliability, Validity, Sensitivity, Resilience) plus TDD vs BDD guidance — BDD as the outer user-facing behavior loop and TDD as the inner unit/algorithm loop — with a shared red-green-refactor cycle, test-first GATE with meaningful-red discipline (structural failures like 404/missing-field are not valid reds; green-from-start allowed when no real red is possible), one-at-a-time discipline, and quality assurance

files.description: The 4 Pillars of Good Tests framework with examples

Test-Driven Development guidelines with red-green-refactor cycle, meaningful-red test-first approach (scaffold structure first; green-from-start when no real red is possible), quality assurance practices, and TDD vs BDD guidance (BDD outer loop, TDD inner loop) sharing the test-first GATE and one-at-a-time discipline
